summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Evolution PRO partner management platform. All backend APIs and frontend features working perfectly. VALENTINA AI chatbot integration successful with contextual Italian responses.
passed_tests: Admin Dashboard KPIs - All 4 KPI cards displaying correct data
Agenti AI Grid - All 9 agents with status badges and budget bars
Partner Pipeline - 5 partners displayed in table and pipeline view
Alert System - 3 alerts with dismiss functionality working
Partner Mode Switch - Seamless switching between Admin/Partner modes
Partner Videocorso - 10 modules with phase stepper and progress tracking
Partner Files - File management UI with 5 folder categories
Partner Resources - Template download interface working
VALENTINA Chatbot - AI responses in Italian with contextual awareness
Real-time data integration between frontend and backend
Professional UI design with Evolution PRO branding
